title: App has issues for some minutes after promoting to live
excerpt: Hi, we have an app, I have made 3 release and I have noticed that we always have some issues for a few mins after releasing, around 20 mins.   Is there a cache or something that I could clear after releasing to mitigate …

posts.author: lokishocr (Oscar Sanchez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we have an app, I have made 3 release and I have noticed that we always have some issues for a few mins after releasing, around 20 mins. Is there a cache or something that I could clear after releasing to mitigate these issues, thanks.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @lokishocr!

Not really.

What issues are you referring to specifically?
